scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "ポータル,作業入力,点検入力,ダッシュボード,事例生成" --prefix-colors "white.bold,blue,cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix apps/portal" "npm run dev --prefix apps/excel-reduction" "npm run dev --prefix apps/inspection" "npm run dev --prefix apps/dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix apps/poc-case-generator"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/portal && npm install --prefix apps/excel-reduction && npm install --prefix apps/inspection && npm install --prefix apps/dashboard && npm install --prefix apps/poc-case-generator
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate --prefix apps/portal && npm run db:push --prefix apps/portal && npm run db:seed --prefix apps/portal
